source: Compound III docs Networks table + compound-finance/comet deployments/*/*/roots.json
note: Compound docs state that the v3 proxy is the only address to use to interact with a Compound III instance. This I0 inventory therefore covers the production Comet proxy markets; non-proxy support contracts in roots.json are not direct user pre-sign entry points for this surface.
